# truenas_apps (Data Source)

Lists all deployed apps on TrueNAS SCALE.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "truenas_apps" "all" {}

output "app_names" {
  value = [for a in data.truenas_apps.all.apps : a.name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `apps` (Attributes List) List of deployed apps. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--apps))

<a id="nestedatt--apps"></a>
### Nested Schema for `apps`

Read-Only:

- `custom_app` (Boolean) Whether this is a custom (compose) app.
- `human_version` (String) Human-readable version.
- `id` (String) App ID (name).
- `latest_version` (String) Latest available version.
- `name` (String) App name.
- `state` (String) Current state.
- `upgrade_available` (Boolean) Whether an upgrade is available.
- `version` (String) Installed version.
